transcript.text: Hello, my name is Kyle Pounds, and this is Living in My Van V-Log.
I actually look a lot better than I thought I would.
I thought I'd look all fucked up, because I've been living off McDonald's.
Well, not really. I had McDonald's today, but I've been living off of Subway, so that's not so bad.
But drinking like 10 or 15 cups of coffee a day.
I've been busting my ass. Ever since last week, I've been busting my ass.
On my website.
After my bike broke down, I was bummed for a couple of days.
And then I looked at my website and realized it was totally fucked.
So now I'm just doing everything, spending every spare second of my day trying to make my website pretty.
Something that I can look at and not be like, you know, a total jumble fuck.
And this is going to take me at least another month before I get it anywhere near not being a total jumble fuck.
I think what happens is I look at my website and then I skip going on fixing it.
And then I go, oh wait, dang, no idea.
So then I go do that.
And then I'm done with that and then I go to something else.
And then I think that I finished my website.
And so then I look at my website again and it's just fucked.
And I never actually fucking fixed it.
So basically what I'm doing with my website is just I want to put all my, embed all my Flickr photos on my website.
Well, not all of them, but to do the 300 pixel on each side thing and then embed all of my YouTube videos on it and stuff.
So it's just a lot of, you know, time and just make it so that it's all, just make it ready so that I can look at it and I can fill it in with writing stuff that I want to write.
But because everything I see in a video I want to write down on the website, but not like totally thoroughly, just like the points and maybe thoroughly later, but I don't know.
But anyway, get to the point where I can write like on a notepad after when I'm out in the middle of the boonies and don't come to city and stuff because I can't do my computer much on my car.
My solar panel can't charge.
It can charge enough to keep the MP3s going, which is all I need, but it can't keep the computer going.
But I don't need the computer going if I can write stuff on the notepad and just look at the computer to see what I need to write.

But anyways, so yeah, man, ever since the last week when I did that last thing, the last vlog, I fucking just in the library all day long and then in the coffee shop on the computer all day long just busting because there's lots of shit I need to catch up.
I need to like organize my Flickr photos that were all fucked up, you know, organize my playlists that were all fucked up.
That's what happens when you have 1890 videos and like 20,000 photos, you know, and you never organized it.
It takes forever to organize it.
But once I organize it, oh man, I'm excited.
That's going to, it's going to be beautiful.
I've got, I'm looking forward to it.
But anyways, a time like now when I'm busy, you know, living out of your car and mountain biking all day is a great way to live out of your car.
But living out of your car, well, not car, van, living out of a car would suck.
Living out of your van and doing what I'm doing, like in the computer all day long in the library.

I love being, I love being like totally like not dealing with anybody, you know.

I mean, that's, that's, that's another video.
